name: mah-platform
description: Mahardika Platform - Complete monorepo with UI library and applications

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/ui && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=packages/ui && npm run test:scripts
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=packages/ui && npm run lint --workspace=apps/web
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --workspace=packages/ui && npm run lint:fix --workspace=apps/web
scripts.security:scan: git log --all -p | grep -i 'api_key\|secret\|password\|token' || echo 'No secrets found'
scripts.pre-commit: npm run check:brand-colors && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run security:check && npm run build && npm run test
scripts.prepare: node -e "if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production' && !process.env.CI && !process.env.VERCEL) { try { require('husky').install() } catch (e) { if (e.code !== 'MODULE_NOT_FOUND') throw e } }"

author: Mahardika Team
